title: Fallen Wizards [More Magic Series]
description: Join the dark side of magic, we have cookies!
body:
# 📦 Installation
## Required
- **AzureLib Armor**
- **Runes**
- **Spell Engine**
- **Spell Power Attributes**
## Strongly recommended
- **Better Combat** for proper weapon mechanics
- **Wizards** want to see more wizards? Go and check out is amazing work!
- **The Ancient Trinkets Index** - powerfull trinkets to aid you!
- **The Cursed Trinkets Index** - more trinkets more fun!
- **The Great Alchemical Compendium** - potions that grants powerfull bonus but only for a limited time!
# ✨ Features
This mod add 3 new playable classes to the game, to compliment the role play experience.

Dark Fire, Dark Frost and Dark Arcane Spell Books
Craft a Spell Binding Table (just don't forget bookshelves around the Spell Binding Table).

To unlock Dark Fire spells, create the Dark Fire Spell Book on the Spell Binding Table!

To unlock Dark Frost spells, create the Dark Frost Spell Book on the Spell Binding Table!

To unlock Dark Arcane spells, create the Dark Arcane Spell Book on the Spell Binding Table!

# Explore the armory
Explore new, craftable, lightning wizard and soul wizard equipment, with bonuses to boost spell damage.

![Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6c3cf2edd04df0982d2c89d319c06f74b44c7a0.png)

Dark Fire Wizard: new 2 armor sets, Dark Fire Staves.

Dark Frost Wizard: new 2 armor sets, Dark Frost Staves.

Dark Arcane Wizard: new 2 armor sets, Dark Arcane Staves.

# 🔧 Configuration
**Item bonuses:**
- config/fallen_wizards/item_v3

**Effect bonuses:**
- config/fallen_wizards/effects
